mapper.sql: alert_id AS alertId, alert_type AS alertType, severity, status, vehicle_plate AS vehiclePlate, cargo_id AS cargoId, title, summary, description, lat, lng, triggered_at AS triggeredAt, acknowledged_at AS acknowledgedAt, resolved_at AS resolvedAt, resolution, remark
mapper.update: UPDATE alerts SET status = #{status}, resolution = COALESCE(#{resolution}, resolution), remark = COALESCE(#{remark}, remark), acknowledged_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'ACKNOWLEDGED' THEN COALESCE(#{acknowledgedAt}, now()) ELSE acknowledged_at END, resolved_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'RESOLVED' THEN COALESCE(#{resolvedAt}, now()) ELSE resolved_at END WHERE alert_id = #{alertId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alert_logs (id, alert_id, operator_id, operator_name, action, remark, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{alertId}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, #{action}, #{remark}, COALESCE(#{createdAt}, now()))
mapper.select: SELECT id, alert_id AS alertId, operator_id AS operatorId, operator_name AS operatorName, action, remark, created_at AS createdAt FROM alert_logs WHERE alert_id = #{alertId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT status, COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM alerts GROUP BY status
SELECT alert_type AS "alertType", COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM alerts GROUP BY alert_type
